Hero.description: Specializing in Laravel, Vue 3, React, and Next.js. I build scalable SaaS platforms and revenue-driven applications.

About.title: About Me
About.description: Full-Stack Engineer with 4+ years building production SaaS platforms, multi-tenant e-commerce systems, and AI-powered applications. I ship end-to-end — from database schema to pixel-perfect UI — and take ownership of technical decisions. Currently integrating LLM APIs and automation workflows into real products.

saas.title: End-to-End SaaS
saas.desc: Design & build platforms from DB to UI/UX.

ai.title: AI Integration
ai.desc: LLM-powered features using OpenAI & Claude APIs, with Node.js microservices.

values: I think product first, not just code
I write maintainable code that teams can evolve
I lead initiatives and work independently

Experience.title: Professional Experience
Experience.ctaTitle: Like what you see? Let's work together

achievements: Built full multi-tenant CRM from scratch using Laravel; supports 1,000+ independent seller stores with isolated data
Developed seller & admin dashboards with Vue 3 and Laravel
Architected Stripe billing: subscriptions, metered pricing, promo codes, Google Pay / Apple Pay
Architected Taby & Tamara BNPL payment system with installment processing
Designed drag-and-drop page builder for product pages (Vue 3 + Ace Editor)
Integrated iLandy v2, a landing page editor based on GrapesJS
Integrated conversion tracking APIs (Meta, TikTok, Snapchat) and Brevo email automation
Led codebase refactoring using SOLID principles and design patterns
Launched Node.js microservices for AI-driven product features
Built real-time analytics dashboards (traffic, orders) used daily by ops and marketing team
Built CRM and appointment systems for doctors
Developed real-time scheduling with FullCalendar & Socket.IO
Implemented video & audio call features
Designed asynchronous systems using queues
Integrated email and SMS notification services
Worked in Agile environment with Jira
Built group therapy session management module used by 50+ therapists
Designed normalized database schema for gym management (members, schedules, permissions)
Built secure API authentication with Laravel Passport and interactive API documentation
Optimized API response times by 35% through query tuning and index optimization

freshmix.title: FreshMix — Custom Juice Builder

freshmix.features: Visual Mixer, Drag & Drop, Multi-language, Cart System
